layman_headline: Extreme fear grips the crypto market — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The entire crypto market is in a deep slump with Bitcoin down nearly 7% this week and Fear & Greed at an extreme low of 18. News headlines point to capitulation, gold/silver dragging crypto down, and crypto stocks underperforming. While extreme fear often precedes good buying opportunities, none of the candidates today show a clean, high-conviction setup — most are either already overbought after explosive runs or still in freefall with no reversal signals. The best approach right now is to wait for clearer bottoming patterns before committing capital.
layman_action: Stay in cash and on the sidelines. Watch NEAR Protocol around $1.78 for a potential entry if it holds support and shows a reversal candle. Do not chase anything that has already pumped 200%+.
expert_reasoning: VELVET is the strongest chart (+1.8 bias) but is massively overbought with RSI 70 after a 208% weekly move — chasing it here has terrible risk/reward (0.66x). KITE and ENA are strongly bearish with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu patterns, making them falling knives. WLD dropped 27% but shows bearish marubozu with only 0.99x R:R. SKYAI is a doji indecision after a 36% crash — too uncertain. NEAR stands out with a slightly bullish chart bias (+0.4), price above two MAs in an uptrend, neutral RSI, and a manageable pullback. However, I'm not entering yet because the broader market context is terrible — BTC capitulation signals, extreme fear trending worse, and no macro catalyst for a reversal. I want to see NEAR hold $1.80 support and print a bullish reversal candle before committing.
risk_factors: Bitcoin capitulation could accelerate, dragging all alts down another 15-20%
Extreme fear index is still worsening (15 yesterday → 18 today but weekly avg 16.9), suggesting we haven't bottomed
No clear macro catalyst or positive news to reverse the bearish sentiment across crypto
watch_list: BTC price action around $58,000-$60,000 support — a breakdown below $58K would invalidate all alt setups
NEAR holding $1.80 support with a bullish reversal candle (hammer or morning star)
Fear & Greed index stabilization or uptick above 20 would signal capitulation exhaustion
market_context: Crypto is in a broad bear phase with BTC at $60K, extreme fear at 18 and worsening, headlines about capitulation and crypto stock underperformance. This is a 'be patient and accumulate watchlists' environment, not a 'rush to buy' moment.
context_banner: Extreme fear and capitulation signals suggest a potential bottom is forming, but confirmation is needed before deploying capital.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 18 (Extreme Fear) and worsening week-over-week, historically precedes local bottoms but timing is uncertain.
Bitcoin UTXO capitulation signals and 50K BTC moved at a loss indicate heavy selling pressure still in progress.
Gold and silver selloff dragging Bitcoin down, suggesting cross-asset risk-off sentiment affecting crypto.
NEAR RSI at 54 is the best-positioned candidate — neutral with room to run, unlike VELVET at overbought 70.
No volume-confirmed breakout setups among candidates; VELVET's parabolic move lacks sustainable risk/reward for swing entry.
